title: sophora velutina subsp. cavaleriei
intro: Sophora velutina subsp. cavalerieri, also known as the Chinese Sophora, is a sub-species of the Sophora velutina plant, which is a type of legume native to Asia. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Sophora velutina subsp. cavalerieri include its potential to lower cholesterol levels, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit anti-aging properties. In traditional Chinese medicine, the plant is often prepared as a tea or capsule, and its roots and leaves can be used to make a variety of herbal preparations, including decoctions and infusions.
